items.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone MAILA-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 36328 .
items.body: From 04/04/2026 to 05/04/2026, a Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 204 km/h) MAILA-26 was active in SWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Solomon Islands, Papua New Guinea (vulnerability High). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 36328 .
